# Chunk Strategy

Chunk Size : 1000
Overlap : 200

## Optimized for
semantic retrieval.

# Embedding Model

## Gemini Embedding 2

• 768-d vectors
• Multilingual
• Retrieval optimized

• pgvector
• HNSW
• Metadata

✓ timestamp
